MOS Integration (Linear / Motion / Notion)

Configure API keys for MOS cross-system integration. These keys enable syncing issues, tasks, and notes across Linear, Motion, and Notion.

Linear

Get your API key from Linear Settings > API > Personal API Keys.

Format: starts with lin_api_

Motion

Get your API key from Motion Settings > Integrations > API.

UUID or token from Motion developer settings
Found in Motion URL: app.usemotion.com/workspaces/{id}

Notion

Create an internal integration at notion.so/my-integrations and share your database with it.

Format: starts with secret_
32-character hex string from your Notion database URL
